title: EML-4 Gap Rules Out Descent Failures

analysis.object: T772: EML-4 Gap Rules Out Descent Failures depth analysis

descent_failure_scenario.description: A tropical cycle with no algebraic lift would be: tropical (EML-0), analytic but not algebraic (between EML-0 and EML-3)
descent_failure_scenario.reason: Such an object needs an intermediate depth

intermediate_depth.description: Object between EML-0 algebraic and EML-3 analytic would live at EML-2 or need EML-4

formal_not_algebraic.description: Formal scheme (EML-2) that does not algebraize: this IS the failure mode
formal_not_algebraic.reason: The actual obstruction is EML-2 -> EML-0 failure

eml2_to_eml0.description: EML-2 to EML-0 descent: does every formal scheme algebraize?
eml2_to_eml0.reason: Grothendieck: yes for proper formal schemes -- formal GAGA

formal_gaga_grothendieck.description: Grothendieck formal GAGA: proper formal scheme over complete ring = algebraic

properness_and_hodge.description: Projective varieties are proper. Proper formal scheme -> algebraic. Artin is redundant for proper!
properness_and_hodge.reason: For proper varieties: formal GAGA already does the job

t772_theorem.description: T772: For PROPER varieties (all projective varieties): formal GAGA (Grothendieck) algebraizes formal schemes WITHOUT Artin. Descent for proper = formal GAGA. T772: major simplification.
t772_theorem.reason: The descent problem for projective Hodge reduces to formal GAGA -- which is PROVED

analysis.theorem: T772: EML-4 Gap Rules Out Descent Failures (S1051).

key_theorem: T772: EML-4 Gap Rules Out Descent Failures (S1051).
